title: Epidendrum restrepoanum
taxonomy: Epidendrum restrepoanum is classified within the phylum Angiospermophyta, specifically under the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid belongs to the genus Epidendrum, which comprises a large number of species. Within the genus Epidendrum, the species restrepoanum can be further distinguished by its unique characteristics. The classification of Epidendrum restrepoanum is primarily based on its morphological features, including its flower color and growth habit. By grouping this species with others within the Orchidaceae family, researchers can better understand its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
